title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: The video argues that bots now comprise most web traffic, AI systems like Google AI Overviews answer queries before users click through, and AI agents are beginning to act autonomously online. The presenter contends this represents a fundamental shift where machines, not humans, are becoming primary internet users.
writeup: The video from AI Revolution argues that the internet is shifting from a human-dominated space to a machine-dominated one. It points to three trends: bots now make up the majority of web traffic, AI systems such as Google AI Overviews answer queries directly so users no longer click through, and AI agents are starting to act autonomously online. The central claim is that machines, rather than people, are becoming the primary users of the web, which carries implications for how sites are built, how content is consumed, and how traffic is measured.
